top_tweets.text:
Engineers don't write code.

PMs are shipping to production.

The design process is dead (there's no time).

Marketing can ship their own campaigns.

SDRs are being replaced by AI.

Everyone's a data scientist now.

What a time to be alive.
top_tweets.author: lennysan
top_tweets.name: Lenny Rachitsky
top_tweets.summary_zh: 工程師不寫程式、PM 直接上線、設計流程消失、行銷自助上稿、AI 取代 SDR——職能邊界正在瓦解，每個角色都在跨界。

top_tweets.text: For its part, Apple has been furious for over a year about OpenAI’s aggressive recruiting of its hardware engineers for its AI devices division that was acquired from former Apple design chief Jony Ive. Apple has also been wary of OpenAI’s privacy practices.
top_tweets.author: markgurman
top_tweets.name: Mark Gurman
top_tweets.summary_zh: Apple 對 OpenAI 挖角其硬體工程師至 Jony Ive 收購的 AI 裝置部門感到憤怒超過一年，並對 OpenAI 的隱私實踐保持警戒。

top_tweets.text:
Vibe coders are getting sued.

People are launching apps with real users but skipping the boring stuff that can actually kill the product.

A developer with 20+ years of experience just shared the pre-launch checklist every AI builder should run:

→ privacy policy if you collect https://t.co/fQELiKiOzG
top_tweets.author: PrajwalTomar_
top_tweets.name: Prajwal Tomar
top_tweets.summary_zh: AI 快速開發者常跳過法遵細節而惹上麻煩；一位資深開發者分享了上線前檢查清單，包括隱私政策等容易被忽略但可能致命的項目。

top_tweets.text:
Apple’s Liquid Glass won 4 awards at the ADC Annual Awards, including:

🥇 Gold in Interactive / UX / UI  
🥈 Silver in Experiential Design / Digital Experiences  
🥉 Bronze in Experiential Design / Consumer Experience  
🥉 Bronze in Innovation https://t.co/CYZed7Yf0K
top_tweets.author: BetaProfiles
top_tweets.name: Beta Profiles
top_tweets.summary_zh: Apple 的 Liquid Glass（iOS 介面設計）在 ADC 年度獎中獲得四項榮譽，包括互動 UX/UI 金獎與體驗設計銀銅獎。

top_tweets.text:
An early beta of Grok Build, an agentic CLI for coding, building apps, and automating workflows is now available for SuperGrok Heavy subscribers.

Through this early beta, we will improve the model and product based on your feedback.

Try it at https://t.co/bpTHpjivWD https://t.co/Rlg4qMLkrv
top_tweets.author: xai
top_tweets.name: xAI
top_tweets.summary_zh: Grok Build 的早期 beta 版本已向 SuperGrok Heavy 訂戶開放，這是一個用於編碼、建構應用與自動化工作流程的代理 CLI 工具。

top_tweets.text:
incredible product, but as an sf vc i have concerns:

i don’t see a .ai domain
can’t find the 6 figure enterprise pricing page
why are we not collecting proprietary auditory data?
$20 once instead of $20/day + analytics dashboard?
unclear how this maximizes shareholder value
top_tweets.author: aymanfsm
top_tweets.name: ayman
top_tweets.summary_zh: 以 SF VC 視角嘲諷當代產品迷思：為何沒有 .ai 網域、為何不收集專有數據、為何是一次性 $20 而非訂閱制加分析儀表板？

top_tweets.text:
You must be feeling lucky 🍀

Consider this your official reminder for #GoogleIO. Join us May 19 at 10 a.m. PT for a first look at our latest product updates and AI breakthroughs. https://t.co/bJih0KFdfh
top_tweets.author: Google
top_tweets.name: Google
top_tweets.summary_zh: Google I/O 將於 5 月 19 日上午 10 點（PT）舉行，屆時將發表最新產品更新與 AI 突破。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: Noeth
top_products.author: mario ruci
top_products.tagline: The coding interview AI that lets you bring your own API key
top_products.summary_zh: 一個可自行帶入 API 金鑰的 AI 編程面試工具，讓企業能用自己的模型進行技術面試評估。

top_products.title: Tiny World Builder
top_products.author: Jason Kneen
top_products.summary_zh: 一個點擊式建造工具，讓使用者可以輕鬆創建小型場景世界。

top_products.title: PromptScout
top_products.author: Łukasz Starosta
top_products.tagline: Track your brand visibility across AI models
top_products.summary_zh: 追蹤品牌在各種 AI 模型回答中的能見度表現，幫助企業監測品牌在 AI 時代的曝光狀況。

top_products.title: Agentic Website Builder 2.0 by Lokuma
top_products.author: Justin Jincaid
top_products.tagline: Design, build, and run your site with a design agent harness
top_products.summary_zh: 透過 AI 設計代理協助使用者設計、建置與運行網站的自動化建站工具。

top_products.title: Picsart MCP
top_products.author: Lora
top_products.tagline: One connection for 140+ AI models for images and video
top_products.summary_zh: 整合超過 140 個圖像與影片 AI 模型的單一連接平台，簡化多模型的使用流程。

top_products.title: Atter AI
top_products.author: ha zhang
top_products.tagline: AI transcription app that turns meetings into action items
top_products.summary_zh: 將會議錄音轉為文字並自動生成行動項目的 AI 轉錄應用程式。
